## Summary

Initial Supernova Site Platform groundwork:

- pnpm workspace with Turborepo task graph
- Shared TypeScript, ESLint, and Prettier tooling
- Core schema, runtime, design token, SEO, structured-data, and form contract packages
- Landscaping and fashion vertical demonstration packages
- Minimal Astro demonstration apps with fictional businesses
- GitHub Actions quality workflow
- Governance, ADRs, and agent instructions

## Architecture decisions

- Astro static-first demo applications
- Private client repositories remain outside the public monorepo
- pnpm workspaces + Turborepo for reproducible builds
- Apache-2.0 public platform license with separate trademark notice

## Commands and results

Recorded during agent initialization in the completion report.

## Repository URLs

- https://github.com/supernovahorizon/supernova-site-platform
- https://github.com/supernovahorizon/supernova-client-site-template
- https://github.com/supernovahorizon/supernova-site-ops

## Deferred work

- Package publication
- AWS sandbox deployment (approval gated)
- Client template GitHub template flag
- Control-plane application
- Docs and playground applications

## Security and licensing notes

No secrets, production credentials, or real client data were added. Demonstration businesses are fictional and labeled as such.
